emotionalleah 10h I’m going to be honest tonight because I have nothing left to lose by being quiet. I am a mother who is dying inside. Not dramatically. Not for attention. Literally — the grief of losing my living child is doing something to my body and my soul that I don’t have words for yet. But I’m going to try tonight. Because two years of silence is all I can take. I am at my absolute breaking point and I need people to understand what this feels like. His name is Oliver. Oliver Wright III. 159 126 2 6

cvrlne 5h I’m gonna hold your hand when I say this: you said you have multiple children who decided to go no-contact. You are the problem, full-stop. This whole thread is giving “I’m the victim”, and you’re not. It’s also weird that you used ChatGPT to put this together, and made it sound like he was dead. 165 3

iggieblue chatgpt fail 1h A friend recently moved and sent me a picture of the facade of his new place. So I became curious about the address of the house. So I uploaded the picture to ChatGPT in hopes of it helping me find the address (or at least guide me towards finding the right address). Well, wouldn’t you know that ChatGPT was completely off base, giving me addresses that were nowhere close to the correct address. I found the right address on Google Maps. I’m completely amused.
